common.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

home.title: Tailor your resume to every job in <accent>minutes, not hours.</accent>
home.subtitle: Upload your resume, paste a job posting, and let AI show you exactly what's missing — then generate an ATS-optimized version that gets you more interviews.
home.feature1Body: PDF or DOCX. We parse your experience, skills, and education automatically.
home.feature2Body: Get an honest match score and ATS score against any job posting.
home.feature3Body: Stronger wording and the right keywords — never invented experience.

dashboard.title: Your resumes
dashboard.subtitle: Upload a resume, then match it against any job posting.
dashboard.emptyBody: Upload your current resume as a PDF or DOCX file to get started.
dashboard.deleteResumeConfirm: Delete this resume? All of its versions, analyses, and linked applications will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

upload.title: Upload your resume
upload.subtitle: We'll extract your experience, skills, and education automatically.
upload.dropPrompt: Click to upload or drag and drop
upload.unsupportedType: Please upload a PDF or DOCX file.

resumeWorkspace.matchCardBody: Paste the full job posting text below to see your match score and get an optimized version of your resume.
resumeWorkspace.jobTextTooShort: Please paste the full job posting (at least a few sentences).
resumeWorkspace.restoreConfirm: Restore this version? This creates a new version with this content — nothing is deleted.
resumeWorkspace.deleteVersionConfirm: Delete this version? This cannot be undone.
resumeWorkspace.deleteAnalysisConfirm: Delete this analysis? This cannot be undone.

editor.title: Edit resume
editor.subtitle: Drag to reorder, click any field to edit. Changes are saved as a new version.

compare.title: Compare versions
compare.subtitle: See what changed between two versions of this resume.

applications.title: Applications
applications.subtitle: Track every application from first draft to offer.
applications.emptyBody: Track applications as you send them to keep everything in one place.
applications.deleteConfirm: Delete this application? This cannot be undone.

errors.UNAUTHORIZED: You don't have access to do that.
errors.VALIDATION_ERROR: Please check your input and try again.
errors.FILE_TOO_LARGE: File is too large. Maximum size is 10MB.
errors.UNSUPPORTED_FILE_TYPE: Please upload a PDF or DOCX file.
errors.FILE_UNREADABLE: Could not read this file. Please check it isn't corrupted or password-protected.
errors.FILE_TEXT_TOO_SHORT: This file doesn't appear to contain readable resume text.
errors.JOB_POSTING_TEXT_TOO_SHORT: Please paste the full job posting text.
errors.AI_PARSING_FAILED: AI parsing failed. Please try again in a moment.
errors.AI_ANALYSIS_FAILED: AI analysis failed. Please try again in a moment.
errors.AI_OPTIMIZATION_FAILED: AI optimization failed. Please try again in a moment.
errors.GENERIC_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again.
